rOpenSci: dataspice 1.0.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Creating Schema.org Metadata and README website with `dataspice`

Reference

All functions

as_jsonld()

Convert a list object to JSON-LD

build_site()

Build a dataspice site

create_spice()

Put metadata templates within a metadata subdirectory

crosswalk()

Crosswalk a term

crosswalk_Organization()

Crosswalk a Schema.org/Organization

crosswalk_Person()

Crosswalk functions for as_eml Crosswalk a Schema.org/Person

crosswalk_creator()

Crosswalk a Schema.org/creator

crosswalk_datetime()

Convert a date(time) of unknown format into EML

crosswalk_distribution()

Crosswalk a Schema.org/distribution

crosswalk_variables()

Crosswalk dataspice variables to EML

edit_access()

Shiny apps for editing dataspice metadata tables

edit_attributes()

Shiny apps for editing dataspice metadata tables

edit_biblio()

Shiny apps for editing dataspice metadata tables

edit_creators()

Shiny apps for editing dataspice metadata tables

eml_to_spice()

Create dataspice metadata tables from EML

es_access()

Get access from EML

es_attributes()

Get attributes from EML

es_biblio()

Get biblio from EML

es_creators()

Get creators from EML

jsonld_to_mustache()

Convert JSONLD to a list suitable for Mustache templating

parse_GeoShape_box()

Parse spatialCoverge$geo$box section for use in a Leaflet map

parse_spatialCoverage()

Parse spatialCoverge section for use in a Leaflet map

prep_access()

Prepare access

prep_attributes()

Prepare attributes

serve_site()

Serve site

spice_to_eml()

Convert dataspice metadata to EML

validate_access()

Validate access.csv

validate_attributes()

Validate attributes.csv

validate_biblio()

Validate biblio.csv

validate_creators()

Validate creators.csv

validate_file_paths()

Prepare attributes

write_jsonld()

Write a list out as object to JSON-LD

write_spice()

write_spice
